i implemented all the steps but it didnt work

ABAP message has the attachment but the interface shows an 400 bad request error

i think that is because the content-type or the boundary

did you do any java mapping in the scenario?

entry.title: Re: I am trying to create a virtual element for the CDS v...

entry.title: Access to Maintenance Notification Activity Codes
entry.content: I am looking for a way to view or extract a list of the maintenance notification activity codes, catalog type A, not maintenance activity type. I am also asking if there is a way to manage that A catalog as a Fiori app or if the migration cockpit is the only place you can configure it.

entry.title: Re: I am trying to create a virtual element for the CDS view and need to get the output as string or
entry.content: Hi @Andrea, It is a very simple requirement , I have one CDS view where I am doing all the calculation and then getting the data in an anlytical query and here I want to use virtual element which concatenate all the serial number and brings that value. I need this value in character format. Why it is so difficult top define a simple characater like field virtual element

entry.title: Re: The Relevance of Business Applications in the Agentic Future of AI
entry.content:
And here I need to write again....

Another follow-up.

What did he have for breakfast? LSD?

Microsoft CEO’s STUNNING Reply: "Agents Will REALLY Replace All Software” 

To exemplify how absurd the claim that you will only need agents and a DB, lets use this SAP example. SAP has S/4. It has millions of lines of code of business rules. The value is in the business logic. Agents will be the new UX for sure and ERPs will be used by Agents. Agents will consume existing ERP APIs. So ultimatey yes Agents will be the norm, but saying they would replace ERPs and you will only need a DB is crazy. For example: the release a purchase order, there are thousands and thousands or lines of business rules. Would them be rewritten in an Agent Skill??? No way, makes no sense. They will easily learn how to use the APIs instead.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Thank you @StephanieMarley and @SergioG_TX for the warm welcomes! I have joined the Dallas - SAP Community group and look forward to connecting with the local group members!

entry.title: Re: SAp Enable Now Producer Connection error
entry.content:
Hi Casto,

This error typically occurs because something on your networks is blocking the communication between Producer and Manager.  Try this KBA to troubleshoot your issue.  Outside that, please also check that minimum requirements to use Enable Now.  At a minimum, have your IT confirm that the settings in the Common Browser Settings and Network Settings sections have been implemented.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Clean code checks for ABAP – Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hi,

How do we register an opensource namespace on S/4HANA Public cloud, in order for this package to be imported.

Thanks

-A

entry.title: Re: Uploading simulations and a book page with long text...
entry.content:
Hi Helenka,

It sounds to me like that you are trying to generate a Compound Document in Enable Now.  This Compound Document could consist of the content from multiple Book Pages and Simulations. 

As Bart mentions below, you have quite a lot of control over the way that content generates using Enable Now.  For example, you can modify the formatting of the content using Text Styles, the documentation templates located in the Resources > Adaptable Resources > Documentation Style section, and the documentation settings located in the Resources > Documentation Settings area in Producer.  For more information on the setup of your documentation, refer to this video.

Once you configure your documentation settings, you will need to structure your documentation into the order that you want it to generate into the documentation.  So, if you need the content of 3 Book Pages in front of the content of 10 Simulations, add the 3 Book Pages to a folder (Group) object, followed by the 10 Simulations.  Then, click on the folder in the Explorer view of Producer and select Documentation > Generate Compound Documentation.  This will generate a single document containing all the information in the objects that are child objects of your selected folder object.

It is possible to display this generated documentation in a library but it is best if the generated PDF documentation is loaded into Enable Now as Media Objects.  If the documentation is added into your content structure as PDF objects, they will not appear in the content hierarchy of your library.  If you reloaded the generated PDF documents into Enable Now as Media Objects and place them into the library structure, they will appear in the library structure and be easy to access by users of the library.

Good luck!

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: The Way of Clean Code: #1 Single Responsibility et al.
entry.content:
@Jelena_PerfiljevaI was raised on zevolving :). Naimesh was the first one to show me that ABAP is not some relic of past, that it is feasible to employ modern software architecture techniques.

Back to merit: I don't find any issue here. If I select with join, it means that I combine all the data into one table. I probably do it for some report. I imagine that I select some basic data from header, some statuses, and ship-to-party name and address (so it's a partner table + ADRC + ADR6). No matter how big the join is, one line still represents a delivery header. But if I join it with items, then one line represents delivery item. I have one method then: fetch_delivery_items(). There is one big join, or maybe even several selects (e.g. selecting from MAKT should be separated from JOIN to use buffering), but the method does one thing.

In another scenario, where I select header (LIKP + ship-to-party) to one table and items (LIPS + MARA + MAKT) into another, it clearly shows I make 2 things. So here I have:

METHOD fetch_delivery.
  fetch_header().
  fetch_items().
ENDMETHOD.

fetch_delivery() does one thing only (on it's own level of abstraction). fetch_header() and fetch_items() also do one thing only but on the lowest level of abstraction. That's why for me there is no proper appliance of SRP without understanding a concept of abstraction levels.

Principles in development are very, very important if you want to write a good code, but they are not a holy grail. If you create complex enough app, you will end up breaking more than one principle anyway and it's not always that bad. E.g. you will never reach full decoupling, you only try to reach as loose coupling as possible, providing it brings value. If gaining more loose coupling will cost building some complex abstraction structure, maybe it's not worth it. If you write a small classic report, split it just into 2 classes from Naimesh's example: lcl_data_selector for model and lcl_output_alv for view. You don't even need a controller, because body of the report itself will work as one. If the report is simple enough, introducing interfaces just to decouple those two classes is pointless (especially if they are local). Splitting lcl_data_extractor into smaller classes also seems pointless. It's a trade-off and it's a good one. In the future, if the logic becomes complex, you can refactor and split this class.

If you want more examples, we can play in the way that you bring me a scenario, I write how I see the SRP in this scenario and then you criticise for refinement - this way we could build a decent set of good quality examples.

entry.title: Re: Advice on Curriculum Basis Date for clients new globa...
entry.content:
Hi there. I can't answer to your migration part, but wanted to help by providing a little more detail. the basis date has a default when you create a new curriculum. That default is set to 1/1/2010 but we change that all the time, or remove it altogether each time we create a new curriculum. Let me explain.

That default basis date only matters if your initial basis is a CALENDAR based basis. That default date doesn't apply to an EVENT initial basis. So it's a required field only for a calendar basis (whether initial assignment or retraining assignment).  In fact you can delete it on an event initial basis. But all our annual training courses we launch once a year at the same time and due at the same time, are each added to a curriculum with an initial number of 1, period of year, threshold ENTIRE PERIOD, initial basis calendar, required date basis is the assignment date (we schedule an assignment profile), and the basis date is set to the previous year + 1 day. In other words, if our content is required by 9/30/25, then your basis date is 10/1/24 (because the initial basis was one calendar year).

I tend to doubt that all the client's existing curricula in the client's LMS are all the same or that they never changed the basis date, but you would want the migration to pull all the curricula' prior configuration.

entry.title: Re: Payroll Canada Year End 2024
entry.content: Thanks @VEH2 . However, both those notes did not add /416 to box 27. Note 3539103 adds /316 and /317 to box 16A and box 17A. Note 3550220 do not have any updates to T596i. Just to clarify, we do not have the issue reported by @altruismconsulting . I'm just trying to figure if we missed any in our manual updates. Thus far our T4 appears to function OK and we do not have /416 mapped to box 27 in T596I.

entry.title: Re: Implementation of Restrictions for Tyre and Battery I...
entry.content:
Hi mohit,
Let me understand the case first.
So the vehicle is maintained in your system as an equipment.
But the tyres and the batteries - I guess these are Spare Parts, right?
As long as you do not need to track those components separately, do some maintenance on them, track their maintenance history - these are pure consumables, maintained as Spare Parts only.

There is something called iPPE, but for your scenario it will be an overkill.
I believe going for custom development is the way to go.

Personally, I would define a class for the vehicle, something like ZPM_VEH_CONFIG_VAN.
Define characteristics, one of them will be TYRES, second BATTERY etc.
Assign the class to the vehicle, TYRES: value 10, BATTERY: value 1.
Build a custom mapping table, where you classify material numbers of tyres and batteries.
Implement custom logic/development, which gets triggered once those materials are about to be installed. 
The program checks current amount of tyres installed in the equipment and compares it with the class 'configurator'. If it's already 10, an error message shows up.

Please let me know what you think!
Dan

entry.title: Optional Life Insurance in EC Global Benefits
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a requirement where we want to implement optional life insurance in EC Global Benefits. Employee can purchase additional life insurance coverage from the insurance provider in units of 10,000$ from 10,000$ to 500,000$. The insurance premium should be calculated based on a rate chart of age, smoking status and gender.  We have 4 options while defining the insurance coverage - amount, percentage, factor and other. All the 4 options do not meet the requirement and we may have to create 50 coverage amount rows like 10k$, 20k, 30k and so on till 500k. How can we meet this requirement in EC Global Benefits?

Thanks for your help.
Regards,
Rahul

entry.title: Re: An Abap REST Client
entry.content: @JesúsM the SAP note renders the report RSICFCLTST01 unusable. Either you implement the note or it comes via the support package sooner or later.

entry.title: EWM Stock Removal -- Full Quantity followed by FIFO
entry.content:
Hello:

Looking for a solution for this scenario of Stock Removal --

  1. If any bin can fill the entire ODO item quantity, use that as the destination bin for the Stock Removal WT. 
  2. If no such bin found, use FIFO Stock Removal strategy

So in scenario below -- if ODO item requires quantity 5 of Product abc -- the destination Bin would be Bin A (since A can fill the entire quantity requested). If the quantity was 7 it would be C followed by B (FIFO) .

 

BinProductQty GR Date
Aabc612/24/2024
Babc412/23/2024
Cabc312/22/2024

 

The idea is that it is more efficient to pick from 1 bin if the entire request can be filled from there. But if that is not possible, use FIFO.

Thanks!

EWM - Delivery Processing EWM - Warehouse Order Processing

entry.title: Re: An Abap REST Client
entry.content: @JoeGoerlich The report continues to exist, you just can no longer execute it from SE38\SA38.

entry.title: Control Editability of benefits based on the benefit type

Thanks a lot for your help.

Regards,
Rahul

entry.title: Re: Partner Consolidation Unit is blank in ACDOCA

entry.title: Re: Mexico payables with two currencies in XK03

entry.title: Re: Wily Introscope 10.7 service not starting
entry.content: Also be aware that you might also need to upgrade the ISAgent (Byte code adapter) to 10.7

entry.title: Re: Text/Association missing in the Text tables of sap da...
entry.content:
After reviewing the examples from SAP's Samples GitHub, where hierarchies are created, I observed the following:

  1. Remote tables are left exactly as they are imported. First, because some of their characteristics cannot be modified, and second, because they might be needed later for other tasks or datasets.
  2. What the examples actually do is create a graphical view using the imported remote table as a source without transformations. In the properties of that view, all the semantic usage configurations for both fields and the object are applied. Additionally, keys that are required and not necessarily defined in the source table can be specified.
  3. Within those same views, if necessary, dimension-type views are associated with text-type views

I also noticed that the views included in the published GitHub packages come without any warnings once they are imported, however, if one tries to recreate them exactly, the warning you mentioned still appears. 

In conclusion, the warning will continue to appear even if the views are created, but you will still be able to change the required properties. For now, the warning does not prevent saving and deploying the object.

I hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Network for Logistics 2411 Release – What’s New?
entry.content: Knowing the capabilities of BN4L 2411, is there a roadmap for Joule Copilot within Business Network for Logistics.??

entry.title: Watch the Replays of Our Exclusive SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Release Series!
entry.content:
GROW with SAP is a comprehensive package combining solutions, services, community support, and learnings to help businesses of all sizes successfully adopt cloud ERP. At its core lies SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, our fully-fledged cloud ERP designed to optimize processes and drive intelligent, sustainable operations. 

The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Early Release Series is a biannual event showcasing live sessions led by product experts. These sessions provide an exclusive preview of upcoming innovations, including AI-driven features and advancements with Joule, tailored to selected lines of business and industries. Spanning several days, the series offers expert demos, insider previews, and real-time Q&A, giving participants a first look at exciting updates and the opportunity to get their questions answered directly.

From January 21 to January 24, 2025, we're hosting 21 compelling live sessions to highlight the exciting innovations shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release. Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you.

Missed the live sessions? We've got you covered! Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you. Don't miss this chance and watch the recordings on demand– anywhere, anytime.

Please note that, as the series is still ongoing, not all recordings have been uploaded to the SAP Learning Hub yet. Thus, resulting in a "no classes available" note when following some of the links. 

 

Artificial Intelligence & AnalyticsWatch here
Enterprise Portfolio & Project ManagementWatch here
Professional ServicesWatch here
Solution Orders and Subscription BillingWatch here
SalesWatch here
Cross Technology TopicsWatch here
Environment, Health, and SafetyWatch here
RetailWatch here
Supply ChainWatch here
SAP User ExperienceWatch here
Public SectorWatch here
ManufacturingWatch here
Sourcing and ProcurementWatch here
Governance, Risk, and ComplianceWatch here
ServiceWatch here
FinanceWatch here
Two-Tier ERPWatch here
ExtensibilityWatch here
Product ComplianceWatch here
Asset ManagementWatch here
SAP Activate, SAP Cloud ALM, Test Automation ToolWatch here

 

An active SAP Learning Hub license is required to consume the recordings. Find out how to sign up​

  • As a customer:​ Access to at least the SAP Enterprise Support Edition is required. Follow these steps to sign up:​
    1.  Navigate to the sign-up page and click on "Sign Up".
    2. Authenticate yourself with your S-user ID and password.​
    3. The system will check your eligibility, create a new SAP Learning Hub user, and populate your learning catalogue. This process may take up to 2 hours.​
    4. You will receive a registration confirmation via e-mail once the registration process is complete.​
  • As a partner: Partners can access the recordings through their SAP Partner Edge Edition.​
  • As an SAP internal: Register here for the SAP Learning Hub Internal Edition (free of charge).

Experiencing issues? Make sure to be logged on before registering. In case of any other issues, reach out to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Live Product Expert Sessions.

Explore more replays of our past Early Release Series and find out more about our live product expert sessions here.

Peeraput N.

entry.title: GenAI features self-activation step by step with screenshots
entry.content:
Did you know that system administrators can turn on SAP SuccessFactors GenAI features themselves once 2 simple prerequisites are met ? In this blog we cover prerequisites, RBP steps (with screenshots) and AI Units consumption explanations for a successful start with SAP SuccessFactors GenAI features.

 

Prerequisites

  • Customers must have purchased SKU 8016532 “SAP AI Units” through their Account Executive (SAP internal note: navigate to Cloud Reporting then search for SKU number which should appear if purchased). Customers must have also signed the T&Cs with their AE. Be aware that there are other SKU with a different number that have “AI Units” in their title but only SKU 8016532 will allow GenAI features to work properly.
  • The environment where GenAI is about to be permissioned/activated must have the checkboxes below checked in Provisioning > Company settings (this can only be done by SAP Provisioning teams). SAP internal note: If a few days after purchasing AI Units with SKU 8016532 the below checkboxes still aren’t checked then escalation must be made by email to SF Provisioning team (or reach out to me or anyone from SAP AI Adoption team (Leads: NA: Parul Luthra / EMEA: Jenny Geipel / APJ: Adarsh Mahalingappa). Please also note that the latest version of each module is required for GenAI to work.
    • Enable AI-Assisted SAP SuccessFactors HCM Content Generator
    • Enable AI-Assisted SAP SuccessFactors HCM Skills

 

Step 1

  • Access "Manage Permissions Roles"
  • Grant "Manage AI Capabilities" to Super Admin role

  • Log out / Log back in

 

Step 2

  • In Search for Actions type “AI Services Administration” page then turn on AI features as per screenshot below. If you don’t see “AI Services Administration” in Search for Actions  after several hours then have SAP Support or a certified consultant run a RBP Refresh from Provisioning > Company Settings.

  • Log out / Log back in 

 

Step 3

  • In "Manage Permission Roles" find the "Employee on Self" role (or create a new one for only some employees/testers) then in “User Permissions” select “AI Access”. If you don’t see “AI Access” section even after several hours then have SAP Support or a certified consultant run a RBP Refresh from Provisioning > Company Settings.
  • Grant permissions for the right AI feature by checking the right boxes.

 

  • Log out / Log back in
  • Proxy as an employee who is part of the role you granted AI Access permission for and you can start testing Gen AI features.

 

How to track consumption

  • Consumption dashboards in SAP For Me get updated overnight after the first use of AI features and show AI Units consumption from all environments where Gen AI features are used (any environment with GenAI features being used is billable). The dashboards only show GenAI features consumption of AI Units, not Joule (Joule consumption of AI Units is only available at this time through a report that can be requested by customers to their SAP CSM).
  • More information on the SAP For Me > Business AI dashboards can be found in this video: https://sapvideo.cfapps.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com/?entry_id=1_dahk6ib7
  • If customer is still seeing an error message in the SAP For Me > Business AI dashboard even a few days after activating GenAI features please see this KBA for possible explanations and create an incident to support. 
  • To understand AI Units consumption better, please see in the screenshot below the concept of 1 A4 page = 0.007 AI Units. To find out how many words are considered in an A4 page we advise customers to copy paste a sample job description from their environment into a A4 Word document with standard margins and line spacing = 0 (copy the job description several time until bottom of A4 page is reached) then use the word count feature.

 

  • Joule message consumption – Is it separate than AI Units ? 
    • AI Units are allocated separately as part of Joule vs GenAI activation but their consumption is connected as per example below:
      • As of 1/23/2025 when Joule is activated AI Units are allocated to each customer at no cost through SKU 8017178 based on number of users in the SuccessFactors environment.
      • In order to turn on GenAI features customers must purchase AI Units through SKU 8016532 (prerequisite)
      • If customers that have both Joule and GenAI use all AI Units allocated through SKU 8017178 (Joule) then SAP will take from remaining AI Units allocated through SKU 8017718 (Gen AI) for billing purposes.

 

Additional links: 

  • Artificial Intelligence in SAP Success Factors Guide for Activation –Premium AI Use Cases (ppt presentation)
  • Premium AI Features in SAP SuccessFactors (Implementation guide)
  • SuccessFactors AI - AI-assisted writing and writing - translation (Set up and hints)
  • Unlock the Power of SAP HCM GenAI: Discover Use Cases, Pre-requisites, and RBP Requirements

 

All the best,

Xavier



(If you found this blog useful please consider giving it a Like)

entry.title: Re: Clean and replace subset of data - Measure SAC
entry.content:
Hi N1kh1l,

I have tested this scenario multiple times and it seems that 'clean and replace subset of data' will wipe out the entire facts table within the specified scope of dimensions, irrespective of the ETL mapping of the measures in the import settings.

I.e. Import model consisting of {Dim1, Dim2, Dim3, Dim4} and {Measure1, Measure2, Measure3}

ETL 1 (clean and replace subset of data) - where measures are mapped only for Measure1 and Measure2

ETL 2 (clean and replace subset of data) - where measures are mapped only for Measure3

On both runs, it will wipe out all measures and replace, so the end state after ETL2 is Measure1 and 2 will be dropped.

Do you know if there is a workaround to clean and replace subset ONLY for specific measures?

Regards,
Benji

entry.title: License SAP ASE
entry.content:
HI SAP I have the SAP NW 7.5 version deployed on Oracle 19c database, question: if I decide to replace the Oracle database engine with SAP Sybase ASE, should I consider paying some type of additional license?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: License SAP ASE
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

SAP support is more focusing on production errors or bugs, which means sap support doesn't have much info on license .
For this specific license query, please reach SAP sales, TQM, or any sap person who is working on contract or sales area.

So in case there is any product issue, no matter what kind of license you are or contract, please always reach sap support.

Best regards,
James

entry.title: SAP Integration with Concur Solutions becomes available for Concur Standard
entry.content:
Get ready for the next step in intelligent travel and expense management! Starting with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502, the SAP Integration with Concur Solutions (a.k.a. ICS a.k.a. native integration) supports a seamless integration with SAP Concur Standard Edition. This native integration offers the benefits of a streamlined integration setup by delivering the next level of automated financial integration and real-time data synchronization for growing businesses using SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

For those of you who aren't familiar yet with ICS, let me give you a short overview.

ICS is available for 

  • SAP ECC 6.0 and SAP Concur Professional Edition
  • SAP S/4HANA and SAP Concur Professional Edition
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and SAP Concur Professional Edition
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition with SAP Concur Professional Edition and SAP Concur Standard Edition

While the scope varies for the different ERP and SAP Concur environments, you can integrate such master data like cost objects and transactional data like expense reports and cash advances.

For integrations between SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP Concur Standard Edition, consider the following:

  • Employee replication using ICS is not available. Instead, you can use the SAP Master Data Integration service to handle the replication of your employee master data in your landscape.
  • The Enhanced WBS Element Search feature is not supported.
  • The Budget Integration feature is not yet supported.
  • Processing payroll documents is not yet supported.

If you got questions/feedback, please leave a comment.

entry.title: SAP Integration with Concur Solutions: Replicating Authorized and Cost Object Approvers
entry.content:
With the S/4HANA 2023 release, the user replication of SAP Integration with Concur Solutions, the standard integration between SAP Concur and SAP S/4HANA a.k.a. ICS a.k.a. Native Integration, has been switched to the User Provisioning (UPS) v4 API. That API allows to replicate a lot more user-/employee-specific data than the previously used User v1, which has been deprecated.

Mid of 2024, the UPS API has been enhanced to support the replication of Authorized and Cost Object Approvers, a long awaited feature. With S/4HANA 2023, feature pack 3, ICS will support that feature end-2-end. I will explain how to set up a simple Cost Object Approver replication to explain the new functionality.

 

Use Case

All expenses are allocated to cost centers. The cost center responsible is supposed to approve all expenses which are allocated to their cost center.

 

How To Configure The Cost Center Approver

Prerequisites:

  • In the SAP Concur system the cost object list must be utilized for the cost object approval to make use of this functionality.
  • Maintain the employee who will be the cost center owner as such in field User Responsible (VERAK_USER) for all cost centers. The linkage between the user record and the employee record is stored in infotype 105 (Communication), sub type 0001 (System User Name), field System ID.

If you call up the field mapping of the employee replication within the transaction Concur Integration Setup (CTE_SETUP), you will see the new section spendApproverLimit. Beneath that section, you will see two more sections: authorizedApprover and costObjectApprover.

New sections for spendApproverLimit, costObjectApprover, and authorizedApprover

 

Press the Create button to the right of the costObjectApprover section. A pop-up will be raised where you need to select the approvalType. Select report for defining the costObjectApprover for an expense report.

Select report as approvalType

A data set for defining the mapping for an expense report's costObjectApprover is created. The approvalType is defaulted to report. Implementation code EE_COST_CENTER_OWNER is defaulted for determining the approvalGroup. 

Implementation Code EE_COST_CENTER_OWNER is defaulted

The implementation code EE_COST_CENTER_OWNER works as follows:

  1. Determine all cost centers where the employee who is supposed to be replicated is maintained as User Responsible (VERAK_USER).
  2. Add a data record to assign the employee as cost center approver to each cost center from Step 1. In the payload that is sent to Concur, you will see the approvalGroup field filled according to the definition for the cost center replication.
    Let's assume that you use the set up which is considered as Best Practice, i.e., Logical System -> Company Code -> Cost Object Type -> Cost Object ID. Then the value in the approvalGroup field will be the concatenation of those 4 values separated by a dash, e.g. QVGCLNT354-1710-CC-SE_301024.

Depending on your Concur set up, you might also have to provide values for the other fields in the costObjectApprover section, e.g. approvalLimit, reimbursementCurrency, level ...

 

What's Missing

So far, we've defined that an employee can be replicated as cost center approver for expense reports. But we haven't defined yet that the employee should also get the related authorization (role Expense Approver, EXP_APPROVER).
The role assignment is done via the section spendRole. If you haven't defined a mapping for the Expense Approver role yet, press the Create button for spendRole and select EXP_APPROVER from the pop-up. 

 

Select Expense Approver role

Now, you can define when the Expense Approver role should be assigned to an employee. To assign the role to an employee that is maintained as User Responsible for a cost center (see also the explanation above for EE_COST_CENTER_OWNER),  pick the implementation code EE_IS_CC_RESPONSIBLE for the field roleName.

Enter EE_IS_CC_RESPONSIBLE as implementation code for the field roleName

Save your changes. From now on, the system will replicate an employee as cost object approver if the employee is the User Responsible for at least 1 cost center.

 

Additional Remarks

  • Authorized approvers are configured in a similar manner as cost object approvers.
  • For determining whether an employee should be assigned an approver role, the implementation code EE_IS_RLU_MGR_OR_CC_RESP will also be available. The implementation code combines the functionalities of EE_IS_RLU_MANAGER and  EE_IS_CC_RESPONSIBLE.
  • The BAdI BADI_CTE_HCM_EE_DATA_CHANGE_V4 has been enhanced to cover spendApproverLimit functionality. For example, you can create your own logic to determine the approvalGroup by implementing the BAdI.

entry.title: Re: seek an answer.
entry.content: Upgrade from SAP ECC 6.0 to S/4HANA 2021 involves technical changes like in-memory computing, Fiori interface, and HANA database integration. Business processes see standardization, real-time analytics, and automation enhancements for improved efficiency and decision-making.

entry.title: Re: Optimizing Production Order Process: Leveraging SAP BTP Event Mesh for Decoupling Inbound Scenar
entry.content:
Hi @hsonnenahalli -

Excellent blog. It would be helpful to also share the technical details and the iFlows so that the beginners can greatly benefit from this. If we involve AIF will there be any benefit here and can ti solve any problems you mentioned?

entry.title: Re: Intent-based Navigation - semanticObjectAction annota...
entry.content:
Is there  documentation somewhere that describe the CDS annotations and the different options for each one? for example the difference between #WITH_INTENT_BASED_NAVIGATION and #FOR_INTENT_BASED_NAVIGATION? What perhaps what is supported in which version of SAP?

I've looked and can't find anything, SAP's help docs are not useful, they don't explain every option.

entry.title: Re: Touch points in SD when creating Sales order with TM
entry.content:
The method CL_SD_SLS_TM_INT=>EXECUTE_TM_UPDATE is the final step in LO-INT-TM-SLS. It triggers the method /SCMTMS/CL_SD_TM_INTEGRATION=>EXECUTE_TM_UPDATE, which is the initial step for TM-INT-LI-SD to prepare data integration and FU building.

The planning update from TM FO back to ERP documents is only available for TM-LE delivery update in normal cases. However, if you use the Sales Order Scheduling function, the sales order will be updated with suggested dates from TM. For more details about Sales Order Scheduling, please refer to the following links:
- What's New in SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 - Sales Order Scheduling Based on TM Durations
- SAP Blog SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS1: TM master data based Sales Order Scheduling

entry.title: Re: About Oracle audit settings
entry.content:

ORACLE_HOME\Database or oracle_HOME\database or oracle\sid\sapprof How can I generate “initSID.sap”?

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: How to add Field Description into the Sales Quote tem...
entry.content: In the sales quotes, the field 'Description' is saved in Name field in backend. Hence, you can add the field Name into the template, it will show the Description value maintain in the quote.

entry.title: Re: Integrating AI with SAPUI5 Fiori Apps: Part 1 - Concept

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Extracting Line Items from the a Document Template
entry.content:
Hello,

You are on the right direction! My personal approach on this would be:

1. Create a document template (in which you have already shown)

 

2. Select the appropriate document type (invoice, po, payment,receipt). In this way you'll automatically have the necessary schema and fields that you wanted to extract. ( I prefer to use the existing and perform the annotation on #3)

3. As soon you select the schema, you can custom the outputs you wanted to extract. At the same time you train on what fields  will be extracted.

4. Technically speaking, you do not need to select all line items in able for DocX to extract everything. Its intelligent to assume where is the starting line item and the last item.

5. The lineItems will become a List may contain a blank lineitem data in the event there was a blank data. 

( I have issues on my trial account at the moment, I can only send limited screenshots.) Feel free to respond, happy to help.

-weisson

entry.title: Re: Celebrating 2 Years of the Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Running out of ideas .....who to ask re Exam voucher (SAP Digital Skills Initiative).

Followed all insrtructions (registered, completed training within specified time, emailed screenshot to digitalskills@sap.com, created follow-up post asking for assistance, direct message sent to @David_Chaviano . However I have not received any feedback?

Please assist ? 

Thank you

Lee28 (handle)

entry.title: When I am running pt60 , its giving error for 5 employees only as below can u please suggest.
Re: Email List - List Tag SAP CPQ
entry.content:
Hi,

Your observation is currently a known limitation of the product. To address this, please submit an enhancement request at SAP CPQ | Customer Influence Portal .

In the meantime, here is a verified workaround for your reference:

  1. Create a custom field at the quote level.
  2. Identify an appropriate IronPython scripting event to dynamically populate the custom field with the email addresses of the target recipients, one at a time.
  3. For each email address assigned, use the script to trigger the quote action, which will send the relevant email notification.

This method allows you to dynamically send a single email content to multiple recipients.

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: SAP PO TLS and ciphers: an overview
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am looking for guidance on how to identify the list of SAP PO interfaces inbound using the TLS 1.0/1.1 protocol. Can you pls share the way to do that?  Thanks

entry.title: Re: Reversal of goods issue in case of invoice created
entry.content:
Hello @AAkash1 

Yes, it is possible to perform a goods reversal, but it requires canceling the invoice first.

Goods reversal can be carried out when there is no physical movement of goods, meaning the product is still within the seller's premises.

For example, suppose ABC Customer orders 100 laptops from the seller. The outbound delivery and PGI are completed, but the customer later informs the seller that the shipping address is incorrect. In this case, the seller can cancel the invoice and perform a goods reversal since the goods have not yet left the seller's premises (just correcting). There is no movement of goods from the customer's side. Such situations are ideal for using goods reversal.

However, if the goods have already reached the customer and the invoice has been cleared, goods reversal is not applicable. Instead, you would need to initiate a customer return process to handle such cases appropriately.

I hope this explanation clarifies the process for you.

Best Regards

Vivek Savant

entry.title: 如何在SAP中查看物料的库存数量？
entry.content:
大家好，
我在SAP系统中需要查看某个物料的当前库存数量，请问可以使用哪些事务代码来查询？
谢谢大家的帮助！

entry.title: Re: SAP Best practices in Public cloud/Private cloud
entry.content:
Hello @HEPSIBHA

In the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, it is recommended to adopt SAP Best Practices, as the platform emphasizes clean core principles and does not allow extensive customizations. This approach promotes streamlined processes and minimizes custom code. However, in the case of the Private Cloud Edition, the flexibility is similar to that of an on-premises environment, allowing you to configure business processes according to your specific requirements.

Best Regards

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Re: What kind of knowledge should a beginner need to prep...
entry.content: Thank you for your reply. I am currently in the stage of getting to know SAP, and I will later proceed to learn about its different modules.

entry.title: Re: Solution to Material Number Errors in SAP System
entry.content: Thank you for your answer. I'll go check the material number.

entry.title: Datasphere SQL view - Lead Window function not producing intended results
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to use the Lead window function in a SQL view to return the Date value of the next record and it coming up blank. The last record in the partition is showing Null - which is as expected. I am not sure why the dates for the previous records are not populating. Similar SQL query in HANA works fine. The issue exists just in Datasphere SQL viewer ( and Graphical view) 

Here's my SQL

SELECT "Customer_ID","Lead_Date",
	lead("Lead_Date") OVER (PARTITION BY "Customer_ID" ORDER BY "Lead_Date") AS "Next Lead Date"
FROM "LEAD_TEST"

And this is the result that I get. "Next Lead Date" should be output of the Lead window function - Basically next record's "Lead_Date" for the customer Id.

Any thoughts on what I am missing? 

Thank you,

Hiri

entry.title: Re: SAP Best practices in Public cloud/Private cloud
entry.content:
Hi Vivek 

Example: Intercompany Sales Order Processing - Make-to-Order(6GC) standard function available on Public cloud but not listed in Private edition.

I wanted to discuss how we will be handling the "Intercompany Sales Order Processing - Make-to-Order (6GC)" in the Private edition. Specifically, I am curious to know if this will be managed as a customization function or if there is a standard function available for this process in the Private edition?

Your insights and guidance on this matter would be greatly appreciated. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Thank you for your time and assistance.

Reference portal:Process Navigator - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: SolutionManager in Standard Support mode
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

The working Solution Manager configuration on your side will not exceed any support privileges. When contacting SAP for support, please see https://support.sap.com/en/alm/usage-rights.html.

Please understand that from the information you originally shared we're unable to provide a helpful answer as more details are needed. As some time has passed and this question might not be relevant for you anymore, please feel free to submit a new question with more details if you would like someone to have a closer look at this further.

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

2. 401 unauthorized error -

entry.title: Maintenance plan was not scheduled - Error
entry.content:
Hi all,

We have equipment and that has two counters – Hours and Fuel consumption.

Maintenance order need to be created once it reaches every 1000 hours or 2000 liters. (Multiple counter - OR condition).

We created multiple counter plan.

Measurement reading entered as 1 for both counter and schedueld the maintenance plan.

Now counter - 241 value entered as 1001.

Call was scheduled as it reached one of the counter.

Now I updated counter - 240 value as 2100.

Now if I try to schedule the plan using IP10 and IP30. Error will come as Maintenance plan was not scheduled.

We are not able to proceed further. Please suggest the configuration or master data set up that I missed 

If it was a standard behaviour. Kindly suggest us the alternative solution.

entry.title: Re: Watch the Replays of Our Exclusive SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Release Series!

entry.content:
Hi

Capacity Schedule Table error out every time

Is it the cache?

entry.title: Shall we do any developments in SAP Content Space ?
entry.content: can we do any developments, like creating replication flows in the SAP_CONTENT Space or else do we nedd to keep the space as ideal to just import Contents ?

entry.title: Re: BPMON qRFC monitoring alert rating is showing as gray...
entry.content:
Dear Srinivas,

I think you need to check followings.

1. Test the data collection in the monitored system referring to the KBA 3258555 - BPMon: How to test & execute data collection manually in ST13: DCC_UTILS
2. If the data exists and is displayed via ST13 without problems, please check whether the job BPM_DATA_COLLECTION* is running without problems in the monitored system.
3. If the job runs fine but no data is displayed on Solution Manager side, check whether the framework job EFWK RESOURCE MANAGER has any performance issues like runs more than 1 minute, any Resource cap related logs are displayed, etc.
If this is the case, please refer to the KBA 2501031 and adjust the configuration to resolve the performance issue of the framework job.

Hope above helps you.

entry.title: 回复： Operating problems of the SAP system #sap
entry.content: thanks

entry.title: Re: BPMON qRFC monitoring alert rating is showing as gray even though health is Green.

entry.content:
Hello EWM experts,

 After creating the SLG1(for MFS process)  logs using FM '/SCWM/MFS_LOG_ADD_FM ' and '/SCWM/MFS_LOG_END_ADD' and '/SCWM/MFS_WRITE_LOG' we are unable to display the same log from the application log button from the /SCWM/MON->message queue node for the error. Also one observation is that, it is not having any message ID and message number. 

Do we need to write any specific logic to display the same from the message queue? Any example logic?

Regards,

MR

entry.title: Re: Display of current material stock in FSM
entry.content:
Hi Christoph,

You can setup a business which triggers on creation/approval of material, and perform an update itemwarehouselevel to reduce the stock in FSM

Thanks & Regards,

Vishnu.

entry.title: After VL31N, Inbound delivery shows no document
Re: Partner Consolidation Unit is blank in ACDOCA
entry.content:
Hi Shekher,

For those 3 Consolidation Units (1000, 2000 and 3000), please check if you have maintained the 'Company' field in 'Define Consolidation Units' app.

If not, please maintain the Company field in the Consolidation Unit definition, and then run realignment job to derive the Partner Unit in ACDOCA, and then release data to Group Reporting.

Regards
Chinnapa Reddy Allam

entry.title: Re: Access to Maintenance Notification Activity Codes
entry.content:
Hello ,

If you're talking about the catalog profiles and code groups/codes, you can use application "Manage catalog profiles" "Edit code groups" to modify the same.

Hope this helps.

Br,

Vijayalaxmi Melavanki

entry.title: Additional Voluntary Contribution
entry.content:
Hi,

  While configuring Pension plan ( workplace ), we have an option of Additional Voluntary Contribution but the limit is either is a flat rate or Maximum and Minimum limit. Our requirement is that employee can contribute like 25% of Annual Base Salary. How to achieve this in Benefits? We find no place to write a rule to check the entered amount.

Do we have to create a new pension plan named Additional Voluntary Contribution to Pension Plan and ask Employees to enroll in case they would like to make additional Contribution? Please let me know.

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Global Benefits 

Thanks

Sri

entry.title: Re: Build Process Automation - Monitoring Tiles to WZ
entry.content: I too don't see Processes and Workflows tile under Manage in monitoring in SAP build process automation in SAP BTP trial account.

entry.title: Question about Third Party Logistics Outbound Process in SAP Business ByDesign:
entry.content:
Question about Third Party Logistics Outbound Process in SAP Business ByDesign:


We plan to implement 3PL Request transmission to our warehouse, but need to exclude certain customers from this process - specifically our To-C EC Site drop-shipping customers. For these EC Site sales, order fulfillment will be handled in an external system, with only the final Sales Order and Invoice data being registered in ByDesign retroactively.


Is there a way to create Outbound Deliveries for specific customers without generating 3PL Requests? Ideally, we'd like to manually register Outbound Deliveries in ByDesign without triggering 3PL Request transmission to the warehouse.
Looking forward to your insights on this configuration requirement.

entry.title: ABAP RAP How to use dates for additional binding in value helps?
entry.content:
Hello, community

I have a question about value helps in ABAP RESTFul application managed without draft oData version is 2.

I created value help which contain three fields SomeID, TextForId, DateFrom, DateTo

I consumed that value help in projection view as below

define view entity ZC_BASE_CDS_PROJ as projection on ZI_BASE_CDS {

@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [ { entity: { name: 'zc_value_help', element: 'SomeID' },

additionalBinding: [ { element: 'SomeId',

localElement: 'LocalSomeId',

usage: #RESULT },

{ element: 'DateFrom',

localElement: 'DateFrom',

usage: #FILTER_AND_RESULT },

{ element: 'DateTo',

localElement: 'DateTo',

usage: #FILTER_AND_RESULT } ],

useForValidation: true,

label: 'Important IDs' } ]

@EndUserText.label: 'Very important ID'

LocalSomeId,

DateFrom,

DateTo

}

And everything would be fine but, I don't want use dates in filter like DateFrom in CDS equivalent DateFrom in value help, I would like to use intersection of periods in value help and in CDS. I know how to fill CDS.DateFrom and CDS.DateTo before creating new record, but I don't know how use dates in CDS as range or interval filter for value help. I asked our frontend developer can he pass those fields as default filter before showing value help pop up window, but he said that is impossible.

So question is how to pass additional binding elements as filter with greater than or less than?

Maybe I chose wrong approach, so could you please suggest right approach for Fiori elements not for custom application.

@Andre_Fischer could you please help?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Missing Work Center plant field under IP18 Output.
entry.content:
Missing "Work Center plant" field under IP18 standard SAP Output. There is no configuration can be done on this.

Please advise as we are trying to avoid to build a custom report on this.

entry.title: Re: Error in Data Action after activate Data Access Contr...
entry.content: Seems your DAC is added to version dimension and user who trigger this data action has no write access to Actual version. You should either grant user with write access to Actual version or just remove DAC on version dimension.

entry.title: Can we connect Datasphere Live Models in SAC Excel Add-in?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is it possible to connect Datasphere Live Data Models in SAC Excel Add-in?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Sending data in excel file from SAP to a shared folder of Virtual machine
entry.content:
I have tried to send using http_client interface methods and getting '405' http status code and method not allowed in response. Below is my code. let me know anything I can work on.

DATA: lt_binary_data TYPE TABLE OF x255,
lv_string TYPE string,
lv_len TYPE i.
DATA: lv_sjson TYPE string.
DATA: lr_data TYPE REF TO data.

CALL FUNCTION 'SCMS_XSTRING_TO_BINARY'
EXPORTING
buffer = lv_content
IMPORTING
output_length = lv_length
TABLES
binary_tab = lt_binary_tab.

DATA(lv_json) = /ui2/cl_json=>serialize( data = lv_content
pretty_name = abap_true ).


DATA(rfc_mulesoft_dest) = 'RFC_Name'.
DATA : class_http_client TYPE REF TO if_http_client.

cl_http_client=>create_by_destination(
EXPORTING
destination = rfc_mulesoft_dest
IMPORTING
client = class_http_client
EXCEPTIONS
argument_not_found = 1
destination_not_found = 2
destination_no_authority = 3
plugin_not_active = 4
internal_error = 5
OTHERS = 6 ) .
IF sy-subrc <> 0.
ENDIF.
* Set HTTP request method and headers
DATA(value) = 'VMFolderName/' && lv_filename.
class_http_client->request->set_method( 'POST' ).
class_http_client->request->set_header_field( name = 'Content-Type' value = 'application/octet-stream' ).
class_http_client->request->set_header_field( name = 'File-Path' value = value ).

lv_sjson = lv_json.
class_http_client->request->set_cdata( lv_sjson ).

*--> Send the request
CALL METHOD class_http_client->send
EXPORTING
timeout = if_http_client=>co_timeout_infinite
EXCEPTIONS
http_communication_failure = 1
http_invalid_state = 2
http_processing_failed = 3
http_invalid_timeout = 4
OTHERS = 5.
IF sy-subrc <> 0.
ENDIF.

*--> Get the response back
CALL METHOD class_http_client->receive
EXCEPTIONS
http_communication_failure = 1
http_invalid_state = 2
http_processing_failed = 3
OTHERS = 4.
IF sy-subrc NE 0.
http_status = class_http_client->response->get_header_field( '~status_code' ).
http_response = class_http_client->response->get_header_field( '~status_reason' ).
ENDIF.

entry.title: Can Host to Host bank integration be done using F-53?
entry.content:
Dear esteemed members,

My client is currently using F110 for making payments and Host to Host bank can be done using this t-code. Now, when processing payments using F110 it does not have a "Profit Center" field. So, we are exploring the T-code F-53 in which "Profit Center" is available.

Now, the real problem I am facing with is, can Host to Host bank integration be done if F-53 is used? If so, kindly guide me. Or please give me a high level overview of the same.

As always, thank you very much for all the help and guidance!

entry.title: Re: An Introduction to Messages in ABAP
entry.content: Could you please also do me a favor, and check your links to SAP documentation? In the current form quite some links refer to pages starting with "ldai1uia.wdf.sap.corp:44300", and those are not freely available to the outside world.

entry.title: Calling an IFLOW from SOAPUI leads to Error response from SAP Cloud integration
entry.content:
Hi Experts

Trying to call an iflow from SOAPUI but getting following error.

~~~

Fri Jan 24 11:39:24 IST 2025:DEBUG:ParameterizedMessage[messagePattern={}:{} requires authentication with the realm '{}', stringArgs=[.hana.ondemand.com, 443, SAP Cloud Integration], throwable=null]

~~~~

I am using correct Credentials not sure why i am getting this error can someone please throw light.

Thanks in Advance

Vijay

entry.title: Re: Sending data in excel file from SAP to a shared folder of Virtual machine

entry.title: Re: Issue with "Show API Key" in SAP Business accelerator...
entry.content: After creating destination and environment, I am able to get the API Key.
